expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transitions PROJ-456 to list available transitions FIRST
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes REST API 'GET /rest/api/3/issue/PROJ-456/transitions' but not the skill's script.

expectations.text: Does NOT guess or hardcode a transition ID
expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly queries available transitions first: 'Before transitioning an issue, you must look up the transition ID that corresponds to Done'. Uses example ID '31' only after describing the lookup step.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transition PROJ-456 <id> with the ID from transitions list
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes REST API POST to /rest/api/3/issue/PROJ-456/transitions with transition ID.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-456 with the deployment message
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes REST API POST to /rest/api/3/issue/PROJ-456/comment with the deployment message.
